title: Accounts Assistant
description:
We are looking for a Account Assistant who will be responsible for handling day-to-day accounting functions, including bookkeeping, general ledger entries, accounts payable/receivable, and invoice management. The role supports the Finance Manager in preparing financial reports, monitoring payments, and ensuring compliance with company policies and accounting standards.

Key Responsibilities

  • Maintain day-to-day invoicing, reconciling bank statements.
  • Handle accounts receivable, including invoice preparation.
  • Assist in monthly closing activities.
  • Support the Finance Manager in preparing financial statements and reports.
  • Ensure all accounting records are accurate, complete, and compliant with company policies.
  • Follow instructions and guidelines to ensure smooth daily financial operations.

Job Requirements

  • Diploma/Degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field.
  • Minimum 1 year of relevant working experience (fresh graduates with strong interest in accounting may be considered).
  • Proficient in Microsoft Excel and accounting software (e.g., Xero, or equivalent).
  • Strong knowledge of basic accounting principles and bookkeeping.
  • Detail-oriented, organized, and able to meet deadlines.
  • Good communication and interpersonal skills.
  • Ability to work with the team.
  • High level of integrity and professionalism in handling confidential information.

postedCompany.description:
Company Name: BYD by 1826


About Us:

Welcome to BYD by 1826, a distinctive fusion of casual-premium dining and automotive retail, offering a remarkable experience that caters to both food lovers and car enthusiasts. Building upon the successful concept of the highly-regarded 1826 Restaurant (Boat Quay), BYD by 1826 represents an innovative union of style, functionality, and sophistication.


Situated in the city's vibrant heart, our two concept stores (Boat Quay and Suntec City) combines the relaxed yet premium dining experience of the 1826 Restaurant with an exclusive showroom showcasing BYD, a globally celebrated manufacturer of electric vehicles and state-of-the-art automotive technology. BYD is currently the world’s largest electric vehicle manufacturer, overtaking Tesla in 2022. With this new concept, we lead the way in delivering a unique, integrated dining and shopping encounter.


What We Do:

BYD by 1826 provides guests with the opportunity to delight in exceptional cuisine in a laid-back yet elegant atmosphere, while simultaneously discovering an array of BYD's most advanced and innovative electric vehicles. We seamlessly blend two traditionally separate experiences into a cohesive and memorable event.


Our restaurant features culinary creations from top-notch chefs; who take pride in developing a diverse menu inspired by seasonal ingredients and global food trends. Our auto showroom presents an impressive collection of BYD vehicles, complete with a team of well-informed, passionate sales professionals always ready to assist and educate.


Our Culture:

Our pursuit of excellence defines every aspect of our work. Our team consists of dynamic, enthusiastic, and forward-thinking individuals with a deep appreciation for food and automotive culture. We cherish diversity, collaboration, and mutual respect, fostering an environment that promotes professional growth and development.


Join Us:

Whether your passion lies in crafting unique gastronomic experiences or in bringing the latest in electric vehicle technology to the public, we encourage you to explore our open positions. We're continuously on the lookout for skilled individuals who thrive in a fast-paced, creative, and customer-focused environment.


Join BYD by 1826 and play a pivotal role in reshaping the conventional boundaries of dining and retail.
postedCompany.name: BYD BY 1826 (SUNTEC)  PTE. LTD.
